violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. A pizza oven and air fryer outside the kitchen were placed on a counter top that was bare wood. This is not a cleanable surface.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. A box of paper food trays was stored on the floor under the metal shelves in the kitchen.--Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Plastic knives in the bin on the front counter did not have all of the handles facing the consumer. Handles need to face the consumer for single use items.
